name: @appstrate/connect-tool-test
description: P1–P3 reference — exercises the connect.tool (run-start) substrate end-to-end. The integration's `login` MCP tool runs a multi-step HTTPS dance (GET /csrf → POST /login) through the sidecar's MITM proxy; the MITM substitutes the `{{email}}`/`{{password}}` placeholders proxy-side so the tool never receives the real secret. The captured `session_token` becomes injectable for the rest of the run, and `fetch_data` reaches https://connecttool.test.appstrate.dev/data with the injected `Authorization: Bearer <session_token>`. The login tool is run-start-only and is never exposed to the agent.
author: Appstrate

email.description: Login email. Stored encrypted as the login secret; substituted proxy-side into the `{{email}}` placeholder. The integration never reads it.

password.description: Login password. Stored encrypted as the login secret; substituted proxy-side into the `{{password}}` placeholder. The integration never reads it.
